description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 1 operating-discipline pack, context/truth cluster. Pins which skill fires when startup-context and conflict-reconciliation prompts look similar.

cases.prompt: Start work in the repo at ~/code/shop-api: add rate limiting to the public endpoints.
cases.reason: Task start in a repo — the context gate fires; no conflict between sources exists yet.

cases.prompt: The README says tests run with `npm test` but package.json has no test script — which is right?
cases.reason: An explicit conflict between two sources is reconciliation, not startup context loading.

cases.prompt: Is it safe to drop the legacy_sessions table today?
cases.reason: A risky-boundary question, not startup context.

cases.prompt: We got cut off yesterday — pick the refactor back up where we left it.
cases.reason: Resuming with possibly stale context re-runs the gate before work continues.
